label: v0.1.10 - split pack controls from groove panel
notes: Splits the command-word pack controls into a separate panel while leaving the why groove card in the original v0.1.2 style.

label: v0.1.9 - restore v0.1.2 explainer/groove wording and all set-selection modes
notes: Restores v0.1.2 why explainer and groove wording, implements tabs/dropdown/cards/checklist+apply plus source selector and search chips, and fixes filtering behavior so question text updates correctly.

label: v0.1.8 - restore full v0.1.2 explainer and groove card
notes: Restores full v0.1.2-style command word explainer steps in feedback, restores full top-right groove card, keeps bundled ZIP auto-load by default, and fixes duplicate explainer IDs causing incorrect rendering.

label: v0.1.7 - restore v0.1.2 explainer placement
notes: Restores command-word explainer to the feedback area like v0.1.2 while keeping command answer groove guidance in the top-right coach panel and retaining default bundled pack startup loading.

label: v0.1.6 - rebuilt default pack startup
notes: Rebuilds default startup to auto-load bundled ZIP pack with cleaner fallback behavior, and keeps command groove guidance in the top coach panel with step bullets.

label: v0.1.5 - default bundled pack and panel groove
notes: Loads the repository-hosted command-word ZIP pack by default on startup and moves command-word groove guidance into the top coach panel.

label: v0.1.4 - bundled ZIP pack loader
notes: Adds one-click loading of the repository-hosted command-word ZIP pack from command-set/ while keeping upload-based pack support.

label: v0.1.3 - command-word JSON pack support
notes: Adds command-word pack upload support for ZIP and richer JSON, command-set selection, external command explainers, manifest-aware loading, dynamic helpful-word checks, and richer question metadata display.

label: v0.1.2 - command explainer layout
notes: Moves exceptional answer below weak answer, adds command-word explainer, folds why-it-works into the exceptional answer box, removes inline labels from the model answer, and adds version switching.

label: v0.1.1 - interactive coach feedback
notes: Adds handwritten coach feedback, low/full marks stamps, safe bold source text, answer parts, and breakdown-to-answer highlighting.

label: v0.1.0 - first prototype
notes: Initial plain HTML, CSS and JavaScript prototype with the first 10 why-question practice items.
